hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */house_monitor/*.py|*/tests/test_house_monitor.py) python3 -m pytest tests/ -v ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read -r c; if echo "$c" | grep -qE 'house_monitor/.*\.py|test_house_monitor\.py' && echo "$c" | grep -qE '(^|[^a-zA-Z])(cp|mv|tee)\b|sed -i|>[^>]'; then python3 -m pytest tests/ -v; fi; }
